scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix user-service && npm install --prefix product-service && npm install --prefix order-service && npm install --prefix payment-service && npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.install:backend: npm install --prefix user-service && npm install --prefix product-service && npm install --prefix order-service && npm install --prefix payment-service && npm install --prefix api-gateway
scripts.start:backend: concurrently "npm run start:user" "npm run start:product" "npm run start:order" "npm run start:payment" "npm run start:gateway"
scripts.start:prod:backend: concurrently "MONGODB_URI=$MONGODB_URI/dc_user_db npm run start --prefix user-service" "MONGODB_URI=$MONGODB_URI/dc_product_db npm run start --prefix product-service" "MONGODB_URI=$MONGODB_URI/dc_order_db npm run start --prefix order-service" "MONGODB_URI=$MONGODB_URI/dc_payment_db npm run start --prefix payment-service" "npm run start --prefix api-gateway"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start:user" "npm run start:product" "npm run start:order" "npm run start:payment" "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:frontend"
